questions.prompt: Как правильно перефразировать предложение: «Unless you call, I'll forget»?

choices.text: If you call, I'll forget.
If you don't call, I'll forget.
If you call, I won't forget.
If you don't call, I won't forget.

questions.explanation: "Unless you call" означает "Если ты не позвонишь", поэтому правильная перефразировка — вариант b.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение содержит грамматическую ошибку из-за двойного отрицания?

choices.text: Unless you don't study, you will fail.
If you don't study, you will fail.
Unless you study, you will fail.
If you study, you will fail.

questions.explanation: "Unless you don't study" — двойное отрицание, что неверно. Правильный вариант: «If you don't study».

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно заменяет «unless» в предложении: «Unless she checks the email, the report won't be sent»?

choices.text: If she checks the email, the report won't be sent.
If she doesn't check the email, the report won't be sent.
If she checks the email, the report will be sent.
If she doesn't check the email, the report will be sent.

questions.explanation: "Unless she checks" = «If she doesn't check», поэтому отчет не будет отправлен — вариант b.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение эквивалентно: «Unless you water the plants, they will die»?

choices.text: If you water the plants, they will die.
If you don't water the plants, they will die.
If you water the plants, they won't die.
If you don't water the plants, they won't die.

questions.explanation: "Unless you water" = «If you don't water», поэтому растения умрут — вариант b.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит ошибку в использовании «unless»?

choices.text: Unless you hurry, you'll miss the train.
If you don't hurry, you'll miss the train.
Unless you don't hurry, you'll miss the train.
If you hurry, you won't miss the train.

questions.explanation: "Unless you don't hurry" — двойное отрицание, что неверно. Правильный вариант: «If you don't hurry».

questions.prompt: Как правильно перефразировать: «Unless he checks the data, the report will be incorrect»?

choices.text: If he checks the data, the report will be incorrect.
If he doesn't check the data, the report will be incorrect.
If he checks the data, the report will be correct.
If he doesn't check the data, the report will be correct.

questions.explanation: "Unless he checks" = «If he doesn't check», поэтому отчет будет неверным — вариант b.

choices.text: Unless you don't eat, you will be hungry.
If you don't eat, you will be hungry.
Unless you eat, you will be hungry.
If you eat, you will be hungry.

questions.explanation: "Unless you eat" правильно означает «Если ты не съешь», поэтому вариант c верен.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно заменяет «unless» в предложении: «Unless the package arrives today, we can't proceed»?

choices.text: If the package arrives today, we can't proceed.
If the package doesn't arrive today, we can't proceed.
If the package arrives today, we can proceed.
If the package doesn't arrive today, we can proceed.

questions.explanation: "Unless the package arrives" = «If the package doesn't arrive», поэтому мы не сможем продолжить — вариант b.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение содержит ошибку из-за неправильного использования «unless»?

choices.text: Unless you confirm, the reservation will be canceled.
If you don't confirm, the reservation will be canceled.
Unless you don't confirm, the reservation will be canceled.
If you confirm, the reservation won't be canceled.

questions.explanation: "Unless you don't confirm" — двойное отрицание, что неверно. Правильный вариант: «If you don't confirm».

questions.prompt: Как правильно перефразировать: «Unless she finishes the task, the deadline will be missed»?

choices.text: If she finishes the task, the deadline will be missed.
If she doesn't finish the task, the deadline will be missed.
If she finishes the task, the deadline won't be missed.
If she doesn't finish the task, the deadline won't be missed.

questions.explanation: "Unless she finishes" = «If she doesn't finish», поэтому дедлайн будет упущен — вариант b.
